---
title: "{{< var icon.video-activity >}} Pre-activity: Example"
subtitle: "Lecture 1, {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}"
---

## Required videos

### How to watch flipped lecture videos

{{< video https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PPc8nY6Tcns >}}

## Optional videos

### Showing the differences between a traditional and a flipped classroom

{{< video https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yzMFdDT6FSA >}}
